(2) Fixed mojibake character encoding errors: '√ºcher' → 'Bücher', '√ü' → 'ß' (in Preiß, groß, mäßige, and the shilling abbreviation ß), '√Ü' → 'à' (the price indicator before amounts), and '√§' → 'ä'. (3) Escaped unescaped ampersands as '&' in two AUTHOR/TITLE fields ('Taciti & Velleji' and 'Heinsii & variorum') to make the XML well-formed. (4) Fixed nesting of the two composite entries (Lipsius 'Politicorum Libri' with its sub-works, and 'de Amphitheatro' with its companion work) by properly closing the outer <BIBL> after its nested <BIBL> children, so the nested bibliographic structure is well-formed and semantically correct."}

parsed.explanation: Corrections made: (1) Renamed all misspelled <PRIZE> tags to <PRICE> for consistency (16 occurrences; one instance was already correctly spelled as PRICE). (2) Fixed mojibake character encoding errors: '√ºcher' → 'Bücher', '√ü' → 'ß' (in Preiß, groß, mäßige, and the shilling abbreviation ß), '√Ü' → 'à' (the price indicator before amounts), and '√§' → 'ä'. (3) Escaped unescaped ampersands as '&' in two AUTHOR/TITLE fields ('Taciti & Velleji' and 'Heinsii & variorum') to make the XML well-formed. (4) Fixed nesting of the two composite entries (Lipsius 'Politicorum Libri' with its sub-works, and 'de Amphitheatro' with its companion work) by properly closing the outer <BIBL> after its nested <BIBL> children, so the nested bibliographic structure is well-formed and semantically correct.
